fields.name: dogs
fields.description: Everything your canine companion needs — beds, collars, toys, food and treats.

fields.name: cats
fields.description: Cat supplies including litter, toys, food, beds and scratching posts.

fields.name: fish_aquatics
fields.description: Aquarium tanks, filters, fish food, plants and decor for your underwater world.

fields.name: small_pets
fields.description: Hutches, food, toys and accessories for rabbits, guinea pigs and hamsters.

fields.name: birds
fields.description: Bird cages, food, toys, perches and accessories for all feathered friends.

fields.name: pet_food
fields.description: Premium pet food brands including Pedigree, Royal Canin, Felix, and more.

fields.name: Orthopedic Memory Foam Dog Bed — Large
fields.description: Give your dog the comfort they deserve with this premium orthopedic memory foam dog bed. Features a removable, machine-washable cover, non-slip bottom, and supportive foam that relieves joint pressure. Perfect for older dogs or large breeds. Available in forest green.

fields.name: Clump & Seal Cat Litter — 12kg
fields.description: Multi-cat strength clumping litter with odor seal technology. Forms tight clumps for easy scooping and locks in odors for up to 14 days. Low-dust formula is gentle on paws and respiratory systems. Made from natural bentonite clay.

fields.name: AquaLife 60L Curved Glass Aquarium
fields.description: A stunning 60-litre curved glass aquarium perfect for tropical fish. Features energy-efficient LED lighting with day/night cycle, quiet internal filter, and heater included. The modern curved front offers a panoramic view of your underwater world.

fields.name: Interactive Puzzle Feeder Dog Toy
fields.description: Keep your dog mentally stimulated with this interactive puzzle feeder. Multiple difficulty levels challenge your dog to work for their treats. Durable, food-safe plastic is easy to clean. Reduces boredom and anxiety. Suitable for all breeds.

fields.name: Deluxe Wrought Iron Bird Cage — Medium
fields.description: Elegant wrought iron cage perfect for canaries, finches, and lovebirds. Features a wrought iron finish, easy-clean droppings tray, two food/water cups, and swing-out perch. Bar spacing is safe for small birds. Assembly required.

fields.name: Pedigree Adult Dog Food — 10kg
fields.description: Complete nutrition for adult dogs. Made with real chicken and vegetables, this premium kibble supports healthy digestion, strong bones, and a shiny coat. Contains antioxidants for immune support and omega-6 for healthy skin and coat.

fields.name: Cat Doodle Dongle Cat Toy — 5 Pack
fields.description: Five irresistible cat toys including feathers, balls, and crinkle mice. Lightweight and bouncy, these toys encourage active play and exercise. Each toy has a different texture and sound to keep your cat fascinated for hours.

fields.name: Multi-Level Wooden Hamster Hutch
fields.description: A spacious, multi-level wooden hamster cage with connecting ramps, exercise wheel, water bottle, and hideout house. Made from natural, untreated wood with safe, non-toxic finishes. Easy to clean with removable trays. Suitable for hamsters and guinea pigs.

fields.name: Tropical Flake Fish Food — 500g
fields.description: Complete staple food for tropical freshwater fish. High-protein formula with spirulina for enhanced colour. Flakes float longer for surface and mid-level feeders. Rich in vitamins C and E to support immune health. Suitable for tetras, guppies, cichlids and more.

fields.name: Royal Canin Medium Adult Dog Food — 4kg
fields.description: Tailored nutrition for medium breed adult dogs (11–25kg). Contains adapted protein and fibre content for healthy digestion, and EPA-DHA fatty acids for healthy skin and coat. Kibble shape and texture are specially designed for medium breed jaw mechanics.
